page_metadata.biotools__summary: Jupyter notebook-based educational pipeline for RNA-Seq and epigenomic data analysis. Easy-to-use tutorial that outlines the complete RNA-Seq and ChIP-Seq analysis workflow and requires no prior programming experience.
